name: Nippon Pillar Packing Co., Ltd.
summary: Nippon Pillar Packing Co., Ltd. designs, develops, manufactures, and sells various fluid control equipment in Japan and internationally. It offers mechanical seals; gland packings; gaskets; fluorocarbon resins; Pillar Uniton bearings; ceramics filters; and fluorine resin products, such as fittings, pumps, tubes, and valves, as well as products for construction and civil engineering activities. The company provides its products for the use in various industrial fields, such as petroleum refining, oil chemical, energy, oil and gas, marine service, steel, water and irrigation, paper and pulp, food and pharmaceutical, automobile, semiconductor and LCD, communication and sensing, and construction and civil engineering. Nippon Pillar Packing Co., Ltd. was founded in 1924 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
